zh.Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Julia Rosenberry於1502年1月1日出生在英國素可時，她的父親Clarence Rosenberry18歲，母親Mary Borden16歲。她於1521年與Henry Goldhop在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1572年1月1日在她的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julia Rosenberry于1502年1月1日出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Clarence Rosenberry18岁，母亲Mary Borden16岁。她于1521年与Henry Goldhop在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1572年1月1日在她的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rosenberry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Rosenberg  . It is found mainly in PA.

variants.name: Rosenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Chaim, Emanuel, Meyer, Aron, Isadore, Moshe, Mordechai, Mendel, Pinchas.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of numerous places so named (‘rose mountain’). As a Jewish surname it is also artificial.
Swedish and Danish: ornamental name composed of the elements rosen- (combining form of ros ‘rose’) + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Julia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman family name   Julius .  A woman called Julia is mentioned in Paul's Epistle to the Romans (Romans 16:15), and the name was borne by numerous early saints. Its frequency increased with the vogue for classical names in the 18th century, and it continues to enjoy considerable popularity, although the recent introduction of   Julie   to the English-speaking world has reduced this somewhat. Well-known bearers include the British actress  Julia Foster  (  b. 1941 ) and American actress  Julia Roberts  (  b. 1967  as  Julie Fiona Roberts ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Julia Rosenberry was born on 1 January 1502, in Sussex, England, her father, Clarence Rosenberry, was 18 and her mother, Mary Borden, was 16. She married Henry Goldhop in 1521, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 January 1572, in her hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julia Rosenberry est née le 1 janvier 1502, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Clarence Rosenberry, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mary Borden, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Goldhop en 1521, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1572, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julia Rosenberry am 1. Januar 1502 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Clarence Rosenberry 18 und ihre Mutter Mary Borden 16. Sie hat 1521 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Henry Goldhop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1572 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Julia Rosenberry è nata il il 1 gennaio 1502 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Clarence Rosenberry, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Mary Borden, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Henry Goldhop nel 1521, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1572, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークハムステド
ja.lifeSummary: Julia Rosenberryが1502年1月1日にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Clarence Rosenberryは18歳，母Mary Bordenは16歳であった。1521年にイギリスイギリススセックスでHenry Goldhopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1572年1月1日に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julia Rosenberry(이)가 1502년 1월 1일 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Clarence Rosenberry(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Borden(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Henry Goldhop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 1월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.01 Jan 1502–1 January 1572: 1502 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1572 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1

pt.01 Jan 1502–1 January 1572: 1 de janeiro de 1502–1 de janeiro de 1572
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julia Rosenberry nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1502, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Clarence Rosenberry, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mary Borden, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Goldhop em 1521, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1572, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julia Rosenberry родилась 1 января 1502 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Clarence Rosenberry было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Borden, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Goldhop в 1521 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 января 1572 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.01 Jan 1502–1 January 1572: 1 de enero de 1502–1 de enero de 1572
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Julia Rosenberry nació el 1 de enero de 1502, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Clarence Rosenberry, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mary Borden, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Henry Goldhop en 1521, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1572, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
